title: crotalaria linearifoliolata
intro: Crotalaria linearifoliolata, also known as the Linear-Leaf Crotalaria, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant contains alkaloids with antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. Crotalaria linearifoliolata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
